이 확장 프로그램은 웹페이지에서 텍스트를 선택하면 자동으로 복사하고, 입력창에서 마우스 오른쪽 버튼을 누르면 클립보드 내용을 자동으로 붙여넣어줍니다.
사용자는 키보드 없이 마우스 조작만으로 빠르게 복사 및 붙여넣기 작업을 수행할 수 있어 생산성을 높일 수 있습니다.

🔹 기능 요약:

텍스트 드래그 시 자동 복사

우클릭 시 자동 붙여넣기 (입력 필드 내)

동작 성공 시 간단한 알림 표시

🔹 요청 권한 및 이유:

clipboardWrite: 자동 복사를 위해 필요

contextMenus: 우클릭 붙여넣기 구현을 위해 필요

이 확장은 오직 사용자의 복사/붙여넣기 경험 개선을 위한 용도로만 사용됩니다. 어떠한 개인 정보도 수집하거나 외부로 전송하지 않습니다.
A Chrome extension for quick text copying

Copy Anywhere 是一个轻量级的文本复制工具，让您可以更快速、更便捷地复制网页内容。

主要功能：
✨ 智能复制按钮
- 选中任意文本时自动显示复制按钮
- 鼠标悬停在链接或按钮上时显示复制选项
- 复制按钮位置智能跟随，不遮挡原有内容

🚀 便捷操作
- 一键复制，无需右键菜单
- 即时反馈，复制成功时显示提示
- 支持所有网页，无需额外配置

🔒 安全可靠
- 不收集任何个人信息
- 所有操作在本地完成
- 不需要任何网络权限

💡 使用场景
- 快速收集研究资料
- 整理网页链接
- 提取文章段落
- 复制按钮文本内容

🎯 为什么选择 Copy Anywhere？
- 界面简洁优雅
- 性能轻量高效
- 使用便捷直观
- 完全免费使用

如果您经常需要复制网页内容，Copy Anywhere 将是您提升工作效率的得力助手！

LLM Page Automation:A Tool for Gemini™,Chatgpt™ and Claude™
LLM Page Automation is a tool that helps you predefine Promet and model workflows, enhancing the functionality of your LLM page.

1.Smart Prompt Builder 🛠️
Users can design Prompt templates in advance, predefine parameters within these templates, and set their input methods (such as through dropdown menus or text boxes). After selecting text on a webpage, you just need a simple click or input to quickly integrate this content into the preset Prompt and send it to large model pages compatible with ChatGPT™ or Claude™ for instant feedback. You can also copy text from your computer’s local documents, return to the browser window, and use a custom shortcut key to trigger the automatic sending of the Prompt. This makes functions like quick email replies, instant translations, concept queries, and text revision suggestions easily accessible. All of this relies on the services provided by the large model pages, without requiring additional API call fees.
（Note: Please make sure to open the page you need to invoke in advance, otherwise the invocation may fail.）

2.Flexible Chat History Saving 💾
The extension supports selectively saving chat records from ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini in Markdown format. Notably, we ensure that the Artifact content from Claude can be seamlessly embedded back into the original text for saving, aiding users in more efficient knowledge management and review.

MapLinker – 一鍵複製 Google Maps 地點連結
一鍵快速複製 Google Maps 地點連結，並可用反白文字快速搜尋 Google 地圖。

MapLinker 是一個專為 Google Maps 地點連結分享設計的擴充工具，安裝後將於地點頁自動加入「複製連結」按鈕，讓你一鍵就能複製。無論是傳給朋友、記錄行程，或整理工作文件，都更快速直覺。

主要特色：

- 在 Google Maps 地點頁加入「複製連結」按鈕，無需開啟分享視窗
- 反白文字後，可右鍵快速於 Google 地圖中搜尋

- 複製連結可切換短網址 / 完整網址模式
- 支援官方短網址（maps.app.goo.gl）
- 自動清理網址中的多餘參數（如 entry、g_ep）
- 可選擇包含地點名稱與地址
- 支援自訂複製格式，適用不同情境
- 記住使用者偏好設定
- 輕量設計，無需登入或外部服務

使用方式：

1. 安裝 Chrome 擴充功能
2. 開啟任一 Google Maps 地點頁
3. 在頁面操作列中找到「複製連結」按鈕
4. 點擊後即可依照你的設定自動複製內容到剪貼簿

本擴充功能所有資料皆在本機瀏覽器處理，不會傳送到任何外部伺服器，確保使用安全。
Save, search, and manage clipboard history easily.

SimpleClip

Overview

Copying and pasting is an essential part of daily digital work, whether for studies, office tasks, or personal use. However, managing copied text and links can be frustrating, especially when important information gets lost. Many existing clipboard managers are either too complicated or lack essential features like search and pinning, making them difficult to use.

SimpleClip is a lightweight and efficient Chrome extension designed to solve this problem. It automatically saves clipboard history, allowing users to quickly retrieve previously copied text and links. With an intuitive search feature and a simple interface, it makes copy-paste management effortless. Whether you’re a student, a working professional, or someone who frequently browses the internet, it ensures that your clipboard history is always accessible, without unnecessary complexity.

Who Can Benefit from SimpleClip?

It is designed for Indian users across different professions and needs:

1. Students & Researchers – Easily manage study notes, references, and copied text for assignments or projects.

2. IT Professionals & Developers – Save frequently copied code snippets, commands, and links for quick access.

3. Writers & Content Creators – Keep track of copied articles, quotes, and drafts without switching between multiple apps.

4. Office Workers & Business Professionals – Store important email templates, meeting notes, or form responses with ease.

5. Casual Users – Save useful links, social media posts, and copied text while browsing.


Key Features

1. Clipboard History: Automatically stores the last 100 copied items (text and links) for quick retrieval.

2. Search Functionality: Easily find past clipboard entries using the built-in search.

3. Clear History Option: Delete all saved clipboard items with a single click for privacy.

4. Minimal & Fast: A lightweight extension that doesn’t slow down your browser.


Why Use SimpleClip?

Unlike bulky clipboard managers, it is built for simplicity and speed. It is designed to be light on system resources, ensuring that it works smoothly even on older laptops and low-spec devices. Whether you are a student preparing for exams, a developer managing code snippets, or an office worker dealing with multiple documents, it helps you stay organized and productive.

Privacy is a priority, it does not track or store data outside your local system. You have complete control over your clipboard history, with an option to clear it anytime.

🩺 AI Medical Assistant – Search, Summarise & Generate Medical Content
Transform your clinical workflow with AI-driven tools.
The AI Medical Assistant Chrome Extension streamlines how healthcare professionals, researchers, and students access trusted information, generate content, and interact with AI-powered services like ChatGPT.

🔍 Trusted Search Shortcuts
Quickly search high-quality medical databases and websites (e.g., BNF, PubMed, NICE, WHO, Cochrane, Google Scholar, NHS, Mayo Clinic, MedlinePlus).

🧮 Medical Calculators

📑 AI Summary Tool
Copy and summarise any text (notes, emails, journal abstracts) with ChatGPT.

Quickly convert diseases to and from ICD-11 classification via official WHO links.

🛡️ Disclaimer:
The AI Medical Assistant is intended for informational and educational use only. It is not a diagnostic or treatment tool. Always consult qualified healthcare professionals before making clinical decisions.

Copy selected cells from Google Sheets as CSV, ready to paste anywhere. No downloads. No OAuth.

Convert copied Google Sheets selections to CSV instantly — no downloads, no OAuth, no complexity.

How it works
	1.	Select a range of cells in Google Sheets
	2.	Press Ctrl+C (Windows) or ⌘+C (Mac)
	3.	Click the floating “CSV” button → your clipboard becomes CSV, ready to paste anywhere

Perfect for developers, analysts, and anyone who frequently moves sheet data into other tools.

Key features
	•	100% offline — runs entirely in your browser
	•	No OAuth or Google API access required
	•	Minimal permissions for maximum privacy
	•	Clean, fast, and intuitive

Privacy

Your clipboard data never leaves your browser. This extension does not collect, store, or share any user information.

Note: Google Sheets copies data as TSV; Sheetszar converts it to CSV for you.

The tool has been created to help you to track the cases you are working with, and to avoid the use of external tools that can take you even more time.

When the extension has been installed, you will see a new bar menu at the top of the site, where you will have all the options you need to have track of your case.

When the selection of the options has been done and as soon as you click submit, all the selections will be stored in your clipboard. This will let you paste it later on, into your tracker**.

Once you click submit button, the tool will reset and let you select your next set of options for your following case.

The data copied to your clipboard will be the same data you chose, with a character that will work as a separator ("{", ":", "|"). The idea is to later on we will be able to split the info with those separators. That's why if you type any of these 3 separators characters, you will see a floating message that alerts you that you have typed one of these. Don't worry, you can go back to the text input options and delete them, or replace them.

**NOTE: If you don't paste the data on your tracker right next you hit the submit button, the information might get lost because any of that information isn't stored internally or externally (Like a database).

Advanced clipboard manager with unlimited history, smart snippets, auto-backup, AI-powered features and enhanced sync!

Smart Clipboard Pro - Clipboard History, Snippets, Auto-Save

Local-first clipboard manager for Chrome with unlimited history, fast search, pins, snippets, Top 10 insights, and auto-save control.

Smart Clipboard Pro is a fast, local-first clipboard manager for Chrome. It keeps your clipboard history organized so you can search past text instantly, pin essentials, and reuse snippets with shortcuts. Auto-save can be paused or resumed anytime.

Features:
- Unlimited clipboard history with fast search and type/source filters.
- Pin key items and keep them at the top.
- Snippets with a simple editor and keyword shortcuts.
- Top 10 most-copied items with real copy counts.
- One-tap auto-save toggle (pause/resume anytime).
- Local-first storage; optional cloud sync for settings/snippets.
- Light analytics: copy counts and time-saved estimate.
- Multi-language UI with auto-detect (ar, en, es, fr, zh-CN, zh-TW).

Plans:
Free and Pro tiers available. Pro unlocks higher limits and Pro features.

Privacy:
Clipboard history stays on your device by default. We do not sell data or collect unnecessary information. Only required permissions are used.
Считает количество знаков и слов, проверяет уникальность и индексацию

Orion — это удобное расширение для браузера, созданное для специалистов по SEO, контент-менеджеров и копирайтеров. Оно позволяет быстро оценить текст на странице по ключевым параметрам:

Статистика текста
- количество символов без пробелов;
- количество слов;

SEO-проверки
- анализ уникальности текста (с переходом к проверке);
- проверка индексации страницы в Google и Яндекс одним кликом

Расширение Orion выгодно выделяется своей простотой и практичностью. Оно экономит время специалиста: все ключевые параметры текста — количество символов, слов и базовая статистика — доступны прямо в браузере без необходимости пользоваться сторонними сервисами.

Помимо базовых метрик Orion сразу предлагает инструменты для SEO-аудита: проверку уникальности текста, а также возможность одним кликом узнать, проиндексирована ли страница в Google и Яндекс. Это особенно удобно, так как избавляет от переходов в панели вебмастеров и работы с дополнительными инструментами.

Интерфейс расширения минималистичный и интуитивный, в нём нет ничего лишнего. Благодаря этому оно одинаково удобно как для профессиональных SEO-агентств и редакторов, так и для фрилансеров или компаний, которые ежедневно работают с большим количеством контента.

В результате Orion помогает повысить качество материалов, минимизировать риск публикации неиндексируемых или нерелевантных страниц и ускорить процесс подготовки текстов к продвижению.

Accessible math toolbar for Khan, Google Forms/Sites, and user-activated classroom websites.

Face Control Math Assist is an accessibility extension designed for students who use the Face Control accessibility feature or other alternative input methods on Chromebooks. It provides a simple, customizable toolbar that makes it easier to select, navigate, and enter answers in Khan Academy math questions (opens automatically) and other sites such as Google Forms (opens on click.)

With large, clearly labeled buttons, students can move between choices, enter numbers and symbols, and submit answers without needing complex mouse or keyboard actions. The extension reduces extra navigation and helps learners focus on the math instead of the interface.

This tool is especially helpful for students with mobility challenges who benefit from streamlined access to online learning platforms

Now with a new look and a calculator that allows you to shoot your answers into a text box field. V13.1.1 allows it to be used on Google Forms as well or other sites by clicking the extension.
V13.1.2 has a percent key
V13.1.6 has a / key for fractions and submits Google Forms with Next/check

Clipboard manager with 100 items history, smart type detection, keyboard navigation, themes. 100% offline, private, no tracking.

Simple Clipboard Manager - Your Privacy-Focused Clipboard Solution

A powerful, completely offline clipboard manager Chrome extension that keeps your clipboard history secure and private. No cloud sync, no tracking, no analytics - just pure functionality that works entirely on your device.

KEY FEATURES

Clipboard Management
• Automatically saves everything you copy (Ctrl+C)
• Keeps last 100 items in your history
• Smart duplicate detection - existing items move to top with updated timestamp
• Right-click context menu to save selected text instantly
• One-click to copy any item back to clipboard

Organization & Productivity
• Pin up to 3 important items to keep them at the top (pinned items never get deleted)
• Smart type detection with visual icons for:
  - Links (with quick "Open in new tab" button)
  - Color codes (hex, RGB, RGBA, HSL, HSLA with color preview)
  - Text content
• Real-time search/filter to find items instantly
• Sidebar navigation: Recent, Pinned, Settings
• Item counter display (e.g., "6/100 items")

Keyboard Navigation
• Full keyboard support for power users:
  - Arrow Up/Down: Navigate through items
  - Enter: Copy selected item
  - Escape: Clear selection or search
• Smooth scrolling to selected items

Customization
• Beautiful dark theme (default) and light theme
• Easy theme toggle in header
• Settings panel to customize:
  - Toggle auto-save functionality
  - Enable/disable toast notifications
  - One-click clear all data with confirmation

Privacy & Security
• 100% offline - all data stored locally in your browser
• No cloud sync, no external servers
• No tracking, no analytics, no telemetry
• No external API calls
• Your clipboard data never leaves your device

PERFECT FOR
• Developers copying code snippets
• Writers managing multiple text selections
• Designers working with color codes
• Anyone who frequently copies and pastes
• Privacy-conscious users who want full control

TECHNICAL DETAILS
• Built with Manifest V3 for modern Chrome compatibility
• Minimal permissions - only what's necessary
• Lightweight and fast
• Open source and free

NOTIFICATIONS
• Blue toast notifications (bottom-right) when items are saved
• "Added to clipboard history" for new items
• "Already in history" for duplicates
• Green toast in popup when copying items

STORAGE
• Maximum 100 items (oldest items automatically removed when limit reached)
• Pinned items excluded from the 100-item limit
• All data stored locally using Chrome's storage API

DEVELOPMENT
This extension is open source and actively maintained. Source code, contributions, and issue reports available on GitHub.

SUPPORT
Free and open source. If you find it useful, consider supporting development by starring on GitHub or making a donation.

Get started now and experience a better way to manage your clipboard - completely private, completely offline, completely yours.
